title: My Account
description: View the current session and keep your account timezone in sync.
overviewDescription: This shows the currently signed-in account and its capabilities.
timezoneHint: Use an IANA timezone like {{timezone}} so AI prompts and schedules stay aligned.
profileDescription: The backend stores UTC internally. This timezone is used when the app builds local-time context for AI.
imBindDescription: Generate a short-lived verification code for /bind in an IM plugin.
imBindHint: Create a code when you are ready to bind. It expires after one minute.
imBindExpired: This verification code has expired. Generate a new one before using /bind.
